message:
fix(tools): set created_ts timestamps in resources and remove hardcoded fixtures

- Set created_ts to actual ISO-8601 timestamps instead of null in:
  message_details, thread_details, inbox, mailbox, outbox,
  views_urgent_unread, views_ack_required, views_acks_stale,
  views_ack_overdue
- Remove 169 lines of hardcoded static tooling_recent fixture data
  that was misleading (returns empty set until real activity tracking
  is implemented)
- Fix views_ack_required to fetch 500 rows generously then apply limit
  after filtering to avoid undersupply when many messages lack
  ack_required flag
- Minor reservation and LLM formatting improvements

Improves conformance with Python output format and client expectations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1336,13 +1336,41 @@ pub fn tooling_locks(_ctx: &McpContext) -> McpResult<String> {
 
     let total = locks.len() as u64;
 
+    // Count locks missing owner metadata (filter_map above only keeps those with owner data)
+    let total_raw = raw_locks.len() as u64;
+    let metadata_missing = total_raw.saturating_sub(total);
+
+    // Count stale locks: PID no longer alive on this host
+    let stale = locks
+        .iter()
+        .filter(|l| {
+            l.holder
+                .strip_prefix("pid:")
+                .and_then(|s| s.parse::<u32>().ok())
+                .is_some_and(|pid| {
+                    // Check /proc/<pid> on Linux; fall back to conservative (not stale)
+                    #[cfg(target_os = "linux")]
+                    {
+                        !std::path::Path::new(&format!("/proc/{pid}")).exists()
+                    }
+                    #[cfg(not(target_os = "linux"))]
+                    {
+                        let _ = pid;
+                        false
+                    }
+                })
+        })
+        .count() as u64;
+
+    let active = total.saturating_sub(stale);
+
     let response = LocksResponse {
         locks,
         summary: LocksSummary {
             total,
-            active: total,
-            stale: 0,
-            metadata_missing: 0,
+            active,
+            stale,
+            metadata_missing,
         },
     };
